'''lafala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scabious|scabious]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scabious|scabious]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lafala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læfælæth|læfælæth]] || [[word:læfælæj|læfælæj]] || [[word:læfælæsh|læfælæsh]] || [[word:læfælæ|læfælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lafafalath|lafafalath]] || [[word:lafafalaj|lafafalaj]] || [[word:lafafalash|lafafalash]] || [[word:lafafala|lafafala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lafalath|lafalath]] || [[word:lafalaj|lafalaj]] || [[word:lafalash|lafalash]] || [[word:lafala|lafala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lafaflath|lafaflath]] || [[word:lafaflaj|lafaflaj]] || [[word:lafaflash|lafaflash]] || [[word:lafaflaf|lafaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lafalatha|lafalatha]] || [[word:lafalaja|lafalaja]] || [[word:lafalasha|lafalasha]] || [[word:lafalaka|lafalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lafalath|lafalath]] || [[word:lafalaj|lafalaj]] || [[word:lafalash|lafalash]] || [[word:lafala|lafala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lafalathal|lafalathal]] || [[word:lafalajal|lafalajal]] || [[word:lafalashal|lafalashal]] || [[word:lafalakal|lafalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lafalathatha|lafalathatha]] || [[word:lafalajaja|lafalajaja]] || [[word:lafalashasha|lafalashasha]] || [[word:lafalaka|lafalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lafalathan|lafalathan]] || [[word:lafalajan|lafalajan]] || [[word:lafalashan|lafalashan]] || [[word:lafalakan|lafalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lafalathaoro|lafalathaoro]] || [[word:lafalajaoro|lafalajaoro]] || [[word:lafalashaoro|lafalashaoro]] || [[word:lafalakaoro|lafalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
